title: Workshop Launch Wizard
concept: A guided, educator-focused launch wizard that makes Playground creation the primary workflow, with a dark diagnostics shell, light decision cards, and a split live preview/editor area for verifying and managing the resulting site.
focus: split preview and editor verification surface
dark diagnostics surface with light content cards
flows: Choose a launch source from Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, or zip import with route-specific inputs and constraints.
Browse the Blueprint gallery with category counts, search, dense results, selected Blueprint detail, and run or inspect actions.
Save a temporary Playground either in browser storage or to a local directory, showing file-copy progress and the resulting saved Playground identity.
Manage saved and unsaved Playgrounds as a side task with rename, delete, temporary-state, and saved-state cues.
Use the Site Manager while the preview remains visible, covering settings, file editing, Blueprint bundle tools, database tools, and logs.
Package or import work through GitHub export, zip download, zip import, Blueprint bundle download, and database.sqlite download.
featureCoverage: create from Gutenberg PR or branch
import from GitHub after account connection
browse and filter Blueprint gallery entries
save temporary Playground in browser storage
navigate active WordPress paths with URL input
refresh the active embedded WordPress page
use File browser with create folder/file, upload, browse, and code editing affordances
